root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: Region where the resource(s) will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: The name for the key pair. Conflicts with `key_name_prefix`
root.name: key_name

root.description: The public key material
root.name: public_key

root.description: Determines whether a private key will be created
root.name: create_private_key

root.description: When algorithm is `ECDSA`, the name of the elliptic curve to use. Currently-supported values are: `P224`, `P256`, `P384`, `P521`. (default: `P224`)
root.name: private_key_ecdsa_curve

root.description: When algorithm is `RSA`, the size of the generated RSA key, in bits (default: `4096`)
root.name: private_key_rsa_bits

root.description: Creates a unique name beginning with the specified prefix. Conflicts with `key_name`
root.name: key_name_prefix

root.description: Name of the algorithm to use when generating the private key. Currently-supported values are `RSA` and `ED25519`
root.name: private_key_algorithm

root.description: Determines whether resources will be created (affects all resources)
root.name: create

root.description: The fingerprint of the public key data in OpenSSH MD5 hash format, e.g. `aa:bb:cc:....` Only available if the selected private key format is compatible, similarly to `public_key_openssh` and the ECDSA P224 limitations
root.name: public_key_fingerprint_md5

root.description: Public key data in PEM (RFC 1421) format
root.name: public_key_pem

root.description: The key pair ID
root.name: key_pair_id

root.description: The key pair ARN
root.name: key_pair_arn

root.description: The key pair name
root.name: key_pair_name

root.description: Private key data in PEM (RFC 1421) format
root.name: private_key_pem

root.description: The fingerprint of the public key data in OpenSSH SHA256 hash format, e.g. `SHA256:....` Only available if the selected private key format is compatible, similarly to `public_key_openssh` and the ECDSA P224 limitations
root.name: public_key_fingerprint_sha256

root.description: The public key data in "Authorized Keys" format. This is populated only if the configured private key is supported: this includes all `RSA` and `ED25519` keys
root.name: public_key_openssh

root.description: The MD5 public key fingerprint as specified in section 4 of RFC 4716
root.name: key_pair_fingerprint

root.description: Unique identifier for this resource: hexadecimal representation of the SHA1 checksum of the resource
root.name: private_key_id

root.description: Private key data in OpenSSH PEM (RFC 4716) format
root.name: private_key_openssh
